welcome.heroTitle: Master Any Language Through Real Conversation
welcome.heroSubtitle: Connect with native speakers, practice in real-time, and become fluent faster with Streamify.
welcome.featuresTitle: Everything you need to be fluent
welcome.featuresSubtitle: Our platform combines cutting-edge tech with human connection to accelerate your learning journey.
welcome.feature1Desc: Practice with native speakers anywhere in the world.
welcome.feature2Desc: Find partners based on your level and interests.
welcome.feature3Desc: Improve your accent and grammar with instant help.
welcome.feature4Desc: Connect with native speakers from over 150 countries.
welcome.ctaTitle: Ready to speak like a local?
welcome.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of language enthusiasts who have already transformed their speaking skills with Streamify.

auth.continueJourney: Continue your journey to fluency. Sign in below.
auth.joinCommunity: Join thousands of learners mastering languages together.
auth.termsText: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.loginHeroQuote: "The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you."
auth.signupHeroQuote: "Language is the road map of a culture. It tells you where its people come from and where they are going."

home.connectionsSubtitle: Practice with your language partners and make progress together.
home.recommendationsSubtitle: AI-powered recommendations based on your goals.
home.expandingSubtitle: We're finding more partners for you. Check back soon for fresh recommendations!

notifications.notificationsDesc: When you receive friend requests or messages, they'll appear here.
